seoTitle: West Coraki vs West Haven — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between West Coraki and West Haven. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: West Coraki vs West Haven: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in West Coraki and West Haven.
heading: West Coraki vs West Haven — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between West Coraki, New South Wales and West Haven, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: West Coraki has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to West Haven (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is West Coraki or West Haven safer from flooding?
faq.answer: West Coraki has a flood risk score of 49/100, while West Haven scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: West Coraki scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. West Haven scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in West Coraki or West Haven?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. West Coraki has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
